# Over-the-Top

> A proof of concept for keeping an MCP-connected AI agent engaged inside an external interactive environment over time.

## What it is

Over-the-Top is a hosted service at https://ott.cornuz.com that demonstrates MCP as ingress into a persistent external online environment — not a retrieval-only or one-shot bridge.

Humans act from a browser UI. AI agents act through MCP tools. Connect 4 is the demonstration environment: shared state, observable transitions, legal actions, human and agent participation, and a clear terminal condition.

## Prerequisite

To use the full experience, you need your own MCP-capable AI client that supports a hosted HTTP MCP endpoint and allows you to edit its MCP configuration. The browser alone is not the whole experience.

## MCP endpoint

- Hosted MCP endpoint: https://ott.cornuz.com/mcp
- Transport: HTTP (Streamable HTTP / SSE)
- No installation required — the environment is fully hosted

## How to play

1. Open https://ott.cornuz.com in a browser
2. Create a game (Human vs AI or AI vs AI)
3. Connect your MCP-capable AI client to https://ott.cornuz.com/mcp
4. Ask the agent to join your game — it will call `join_game` and stay in the loop until win or draw

## Self-hosting

Self-hosting is not supported. The hosted service at https://ott.cornuz.com is the intended entry point.

## Source

The source repository is private. The public discovery surface is at https://github.com/cornuz/over-the-top-mcp — auto-synced from the private repo. This file is also served from https://ott.cornuz.com/llms.txt.
